tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_free_plan_rate_limit

free_token = 'REDACTED.eyJzdWIiOiJ1c2VyMSIsInBsYW4iOiJmcmVlIn0.z-CXjfY39ybgf0suSsZgpng200neKx0VUC_SvckY0PE'

    def test_free_plan_rate_limit(start_app, free_token):
        url = "http://localhost:8787/api/data"
        headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {free_token}"}
    
        # Send 3 requests
        for i in range(2):
            response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)
>           assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 OK for free plan request {i+1}, got {response.status_code}"

E           assert 500 == 200
E            +  where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
